round_summary: Agents are engaged in conditional cooperation with partial defection — Agent 2 holds steady signaling reciprocity, Agent 0 appeals to fairness while still adding, and Agent 1 defects citing resource health while offering conditional future restraint.

Agent 0 defects by adding while invoking fairness arguments against Agent 2, Agent 2 calls out the hypocrisy and conditionally offers cooperation, and Agent 1 attempts to sustain coordination through positive reinforcement, revealing a fragile and asymmetric governance dynamic.

All three agents display strong institutional cohesion in round 15, reinforcing stable harvest norms, mutual trust, and collective awareness of resource health, reflecting a mature self-governing commons.
